[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 1100110 4
2 1011111 6
3 0110110 4
4 1001101 4
5 0011111 5
6 0011011 4
7 1111110 6

12 0010000 1
23 0000000 a

56 0101010 3
67 0000001 1
70 1000110 3
